title: pancratium maritimum
intro: Pancratium maritimum, commonly known as Sea Lily or Sea Daffodil, is a perennial plant that grows in sandy coastal areas and is characterized by its white, bell-shaped flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pancratium maritimum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or taken in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties.
